zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Cressi於1370年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾格坦時，她的父親Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock32歲，母親Agnes De Swan29歲。她於1385年與Sir John Markham I在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾可坦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年9月27日在英國諾廷加姆爾霍德索可享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Cressi于1370年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾格坦时，她的父亲Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock32岁，母亲Agnes De Swan29岁。她于1385年与Sir John Markham I在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾可坦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1408年9月27日在英国諾廷加姆爾霍德索可享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cressi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Bresci, itself a variant of Brescia .
habitational name from Bresso in Milan province,showing the same regularization of form, characteristic of northernItaly.

variants.name: Brescia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Franco, Salvatore, Carlo, Donato, Pasquale, Rocco, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Duilio, Quirino.
Italian: habitational name from the city of Brescia in northernItaly.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Cressi was born in 1370, in Gotham, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock, was 32 and her mother, Agnes De Swan, was 29. She married Sir John Markham I in 1385, in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 27 September 1408, in Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Cressi est née en 1370, à Gotham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Swan, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Markham I en 1385, à Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 septembre 1408, à Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1385 in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Markham I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Cressiが1370年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアゴサムで生まれた時，父Sir John de Cressy of Hodsockは32歳，母Agnes De Swanは29歳であった。1385年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアコサムでSir John Markham Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1408年9月27日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホードソックで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト マークハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Cressi(이)가 1370년 영국 노틴그함실르 가섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De Swan(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 컷함에서 Sir John Markham I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 9월 27일 영국 노틴그함실르 호드속에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 이스트 마카에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Markham I em 1385, em Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1408, em Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Cressi родилась в 1370 г. в местности готам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Swan, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Markham I в 1385 г. в местности котам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 27 сентября 1408 г. в местности ходсокк, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст мархам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
